data.title: New State Capital Partners launches Forge Select, a non-control investment strategy led by Sanjay Gupta.
data.description: In New Rochelle, New York, on January 26, 2026, Lower middle market expert New State Capital Partners introduced Forge Select, a new non-control investment strategy. Forge Select is tailored to collaborate with top independent sponsors. This initiative represents New State's commitment to expanding its reach in the investment landscape.

data.title: National School Choice Week starts in Washington, with 230+ schools participating to aid parents in finding schools for their kids.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in Washington and nationwide, aimed at assisting parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 230 schools in Washington are participating by organizing open houses and events to inform parents about their educational options. This initiative emphasizes the importance of empowering parents to make informed decisions about their children's education.

data.title: Blue Moon Metals to trade on Nasdaq as 'BMM' on Jan. 26 and appoints Peter Madsen to the board. TSXV: MOON, Frankfurt: 8SX0.
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. revealed today that starting on January 26th, their common shares are set to be traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market using the symbol "BMM." Investors can find the company listed as (TSXV: MOON), (Z: BMM), and (Frankfurt: 8SX0). This move marks a significant milestone for Blue Moon as they broaden their market presence.

data.title: Ripley PR hosting free workshop on March 3 to help East Tennessee nonprofits fundraise and grow with PR strategies.
data.description: An acclaimed PR agency based in Maryville, Tennessee, will be offering practical PR strategies to enhance visibility, donor engagement, and community backing for nonprofits in East Tennessee. The event is scheduled for March 3 and will feature Ripley PR, a well-known agency that has garnered recognition for its expertise in public relations. The session aims to assist organizations in improving their outreach and will take place in Maryville. The agency's initiative underscores their commitment to supporting local nonprofits and is set to be a valuable resource for those seeking to enhance their community impact. This event follows a press release on January 26, 2026, from Ripley PR via PRNewswire, indicating their dedication to assisting nonprofits in East Tennessee.

data.title: Parents in California seeking right school fit - over 1,970 schools participating in National School Choice Week.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in California and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 1,970 schools and organizations in California are participating in this event.

data.title: Keeper Security to integrate privileged access controls into Slack, maintaining zero-trust principles. Chicago, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: Keeper Security recently announced a new integration in Chicago on January 26, 2026. The integration is part of their strategy to incorporate security measures into current systems without compromising their zero-knowledge or least-privilege principles. Keeper Security is known as a top provider in zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access Management. This move aligns with their goal to strengthen security across platforms while maintaining high levels of confidentiality and restricted access.

data.title: National School Choice Week begins in Oregon with 160+ schools hosting events to help parents find the right K-12 schools for their children.
data.description: In Salem, Oregon, starting January 26, 2026, National School Choice Week commences both locally and nationally, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their children. Over 160 schools throughout Oregon, including the Beaver State, are participating in this initiative by organizing open houses...

data.title: Monster Energy athletes win big at X Games Aspen 2026: 16-year-old Jessica Perlmutter claims gold in women's Knuckle Huck, while Rene Rinnekangas from Finland wins men's event.
data.description: In the Women's Snowboard Knuckle Huck event at the X Games, 16-year-old Jessica Perlmutter, a rider from Vermont representing Monster Army, won the gold medal in her X Games debut. The silver medal was claimed by Cocomo Murase from Japan. On the men's side of the competition, 26-year-old Rene Rinnekangas from Finland secured the gold medal. Halldor Helgason from Iceland managed to earn a spot on the podium as well.

data.title: Coloplast A/S Q1 2025/26 Earnings Release conference call on 6 Feb 2026 at 11.00am CET. Presentation available online.Total Characters: 114.
data.description: On Friday, February 6, 2026, from 11:00 to 12:00am CET, Coloplast will conduct a conference call following the release of its Q1 2025/26 interim financial results set to publish at 07:30am CET the same day. The purpose is to present the financial outcomes and address inquiries from investors and financial analysts. A presentation will be accessible on Coloplast’s website roughly an hour ahead of the call. The webcast of this event will be live and accessible for viewing post the scheduled call time.

data.title: AI in Medical Imaging Market projected to reach USD 8.56 billion by 2040, from current USD 1.75 billion, with a CAGR of 30%.
data.description: A new report on AI in Medical Imaging has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com offering insights on the market until 2030. The current value of the global AI in medical imaging market stands at USD 1.75 billion. It is expected to reach USD 8.56 billion by 2040 with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 30%. The report covers the distribution by application area, type of image processed, and key geographical regions. This detailed market analysis highlights the significant growth of AI in medical imaging.

data.title: GLMC 2026 Roundtable in Riyadh concludes with 6 actions to improve global labor markets, led by Minister Al Rajhi.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on Jan. 26, 2026, the Ministerial Roundtable of the third edition of the Global Labor Market Conference (GLMC) wrapped up today. The event was overseen by Eng. Ahmed bin Sulaiman Al Rajhi, the Minister of Human Resources and Social Development.

data.title: Canada Nickel selected Ausenco as lead engineering consultant for Crawford Nickel Sulphide Project. (Characters: 94)
data.description: Canada Nickel Company Inc. has recently announced that they have granted Ausenco Engineering Canada ULC a contract to initiate detailed engineering for the Process Plant. This news comes on January 26, 2026, with Canada Nickel trading on the TSXV as CNC and OTCQB as CNIKF. The contract signifies a significant step forward for the company in their operations.

data.title: Brightstar Lottery PLC implements Sales Wizard tool for Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation, boosting sales automation.
data.description: London, 26th January 2026 - Brightstar Lottery PLC (NYSE: BRSL) declared the implementation of its Sales Wizard salesforce automation tool at the Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation ("OLG"). By introducing their robust cloud-based Sales Wizard, Brightstar aims to enhance sales efficiency at OLG.
Putin and the King of Malaysia are holding a meeting in St. Petersburg.

data.title: BTC dips 30% post recent Yen intervention, history shows it usually rebounds 100%+, sparking trader interest.
data.description: Previous instances of significant yen fluctuations have been accompanied by a 30% decline in the price of Bitcoin, which was then followed by a substantial recovery of over 100%. Market observers are closely monitoring this trend as discussions about potential intervention by Japan resurface.

data.title: Oceanic to raise up to $50M through equity financing for Ungava Bay Projects in Canada, to be used for development activities.
data.description: Oceanic Iron Ore Corp., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed plans on January 26, 2026, for a combined brokered and non-brokered financing initiative totaling up to $50 million. The purpose of this financing is to propel development efforts at Oceanic's Ungava Bay Projects located in Northern Quebec, Canada.

data.title: Global Biomethane Market projected to reach $56.64 billion by 2030, growing from $16.50 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 28.0%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on January 26, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the worldwide Biomethane Market is expected to increase significantly from USD 16.50 billion in 2025 to USD 56.64 billion by 2030. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 28.0% over the forecast period. For more information, there are 170 options available for exploration.

data.title: Smurfit Westrock to report 2025 Q4 and full-year results with investor update on Feb 11, 2026 at 6:30 am ET (11:30 am GMT) on Smurfitwestrock.com.
data.description: Dublin-based company Smurfit Westrock plc (NYSE: SW; LSE: SWR) is scheduled to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025 on February 11, 2026, around 6:30 am ET (11:30 am GMT). The update will also include information on the company's Medium-Term Plan, capital allocation priorities, and value drivers. Interested investors can access Smurfit Westrock's earnings release and related documents, along with the investor presentation, on smurfitwestrock.com.

data.title: CEO of Sharplink Gaming Inc., Joseph Chalom, recognizes Michael Saylor's role in cryptocurrency treasury firms but believes Ethereum unlocks more potential. Ethereum seen as more productive and programmable than Bitcoin.
data.description: Joseph Chalom, the CEO of Sharplink Gaming Inc. (NASDAQ: SBET), recently acknowledged Michael Saylor's significant impact in establishing standards for publicly-listed cryptocurrency treasury companies. Chalom, leading Sharplink's Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) operations, praised Saylor for showcasing the sustainability of a digital asset treasury firm over an extended period. Saylor, heading the largest Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR), demonstrated the effectiveness of leveraging capital markets to increase exposure with credibility and liquidity. Despite this, Chalom emphasized that Sharplink's approach differs considerably. Highlighting Ethereum's superiority over other assets, Chalom described it as a transformative opportunity, distinct from Bitcoin due to its innate productivity and programmable nature. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.
